author: mark
text:
SPEC sweep: rewrite SPEC-tracker-state for the unified model

Rename docs/SPEC-federated-state.md to SPEC-tracker-state.md and rewrite it around one un-moded model: a tracker address (state_url, state_branch) with an implicit default, materialized as a single .balls/state-repo checkout. Standalone and federated are one code path differing only in the address. Documents the config-ownership split (config.json workspace-owned, project.json project-owned on the tracker branch, project wins on overlap), retirement of the master.json pointer, plugin config as project config, and the tracker/workspace terminology.

Amend SPEC-orphan-branch-state.md section 4: the state branch carries the project's shared state -- task files and project config -- not 'tasks and nothing else'; the .balls/state-repo checkout supersedes .balls/worktree.

Amend SPEC-orphan-branch-state.md section 5: de-hedge the merge invariant to one rule, one compact line per top-level field, verified against task_io.rs serialize_mergeable. Disjoint-field edits never collide; same-field edits go to the field-wise resolver; depends_on stays in the task file. Drop the 'split deps if churn appears' escape hatch -- merge cleanliness is unconditional.

Docs only; no code change. The implementation refactors this SPEC gates are tracked under epic bl-e118.
